competencies.name: Technical Leadership
competencies.description: Lead technical direction for a team-level initiative, make clear trade-offs, and guide engineers through design reviews.

competencies.name: Stakeholder Influence
competencies.description: Translate technical decisions into business impact and align product, engineering, and leadership stakeholders.

competencies.name: System Design
competencies.description: Design reliable, scalable services with explicit trade-offs around performance, cost, security, and maintainability.

competencies.name: Mentoring
competencies.description: Coach junior engineers through feedback, code review, pairing, and growth-oriented delegation.

competencies.name: Execution Ownership
competencies.description: Own delivery from discovery to rollout, manage risks early, and communicate progress with measurable outcomes.
